ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server software */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server software */,
  "developed_by" TEXT /* Entity or individual that developed the server */,
  "software_license" TEXT /* License type under which the server software operates */,
  "last_stable_version" TEXT /* Last stable version of the server software */,
  "latest_release_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest release of the server software */,
  "os_compatibility" TEXT /* Operating systems on which the server software is compatible */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the server software was first installed */,
  "installation_location" TEXT /* Location where the software is installed */,
  "support_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the support for the software expires */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the server software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., GPL, Apache) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license terms and conditions */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Level of support provided under the license */,
  "license_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "renewal_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for renewing the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the server software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is stable */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL where the version can be downloaded */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "security_patches" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version includes security patches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was applied */,
  "update_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the changes made in the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or admin who applied the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Security, Bug Fix, Feature) */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the update was automated */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the update (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Deprecated) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the status was last checked */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the server status */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update applied to the server */,
  "next_update_due" TEXT /* Date when the next update is due */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score of the server (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_status_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the server management team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the team member belongs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the team member */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the change that was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "affected_columns" TEXT /* Columns affected by the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Update, License Expiration) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User who sent the notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "best_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each best practice entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "practice_description" TEXT /* Description of the best practice */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the best practice was added */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the best practice (e.g., Security, Performance) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the best practice (e.g., Official Documentation, Community) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_best_practices_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being measured (e.g., CPU usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., CPU, Memory, Network) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., %, MB, Mbps) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server software */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "version_required" TEXT /* Required version of the dependency */,
  "dependency_url" TEXT /* URL where the dependency can be downloaded */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the dependency */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_dependencies_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)
